themes.exampleQuote: I've been to Belgium several times and this place has waffles that are just as good as what you could get in Liège.
I'm an ice cream snob and this is some of the best ice cream I've ever had.
The owner is extremely friendly and helped make the experience that much better.
The comment 'I'm not going to waste any more ice cream on you all,' delivered in a rude tone, made us feel uncomfortable.
The sage salted almond on a waffle was so good.

notable_quote: I've been to Belgium several times and this place has waffles that are just as good as what you could get in Liège.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers are emphatic about the ice cream quality and the Liège waffles, often calling both out separately before noting how good they are together; the one recurring friction point is a sample-limit policy that has landed as rude on at least two visits.
quarter_narrative: Twenty-nine Pittsburgh creators filmed Treat this quarter — 1.3 million TikTok plays, zero posts from the business itself in the last 199 days. The city is doing the storytelling; Treat is watching from the counter. That gap is the whole story of Spring 2026 for this shop: a nearly perfect review record, a creator community that has genuinely adopted the place, and an Instagram that has been dark since last fall. Family leader Page's is running away with the Pittsburgh Sweets conversation on social momentum, which is exactly the axis Treat has abandoned. The rank climbs when Treat starts showing up in its own story — the raw material is already there, flavor names like sage salted almond and a waffle that passes the Belgium test are exactly the kind of specificity that moves a feed.
tldr_read: Thirty creators, 1.3M TikTok plays, 199 days without an Instagram post — Ones to Watch, #3 in Pittsburgh Ice Cream.
tldr_meaning: Every signal axis is at or above the family median except Instagram momentum, which is near zero — the ceiling here is much higher than the current rank reflects, and it hinges entirely on whether the account goes active again.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: A Million TikTok Plays And Counting, Built On A Dormant Instagram

playbook.headline: End the 199-day Instagram silence
playbook.action: Post once a week to @treat_pgh — a waffle close-up, a flavor name on a chalkboard, anything — to reactivate a feed sitting on 7.65% engagement.

playbook.headline: Redirect creator energy back to your account
playbook.action: Tag the 29 creators already filming here in Instagram Stories; 1.3M plays of existing TikTok content is a ready-made reason to re-engage that audience without starting from zero.

playbook.headline: Post a visible sample-limit policy
playbook.action: A small counter sign clarifying the sample limit would address the two negative reviews directly and remove the ambiguity that has cost the shop otherwise five-star visits.
